test.command: cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && npx vitest run && cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/extension && npx vitest run

typecheck.command: cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.server.json

blockingIssues.description: Timeline source-path detection regex is too permissive and classifies non-source dotted text (for example, "Node.js") as source links, which can trigger incorrect Sources-tab navigation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a timeline negative-navigation assertion ensuring entries without wiki/source references are not clickable and do not switch tabs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review timeline-view found SOURCE_PATH_PATTERN false positives for dotted non-path text; current timeline assertions validate positive navigation only.
